prompt: SOC flagged workstation 10.0.4.10 for unusual behavior. I pulled a ~20 minute capture from their switch span port: /sessions/sweet-trusting-darwin/mnt/pcap_analysis_sandbox/pcaps/eval-beacon.pcap. Can you take a look and tell me if there's anything concerning? If so I need IOCs I can feed into our SIEM.

assertions.description: Report identifies 185.220.101.45 as the beacon destination
Report identifies the suspicious domain c2-check.examplebad.xyz
Report includes an IOC table / list with the malicious IP and domain
Report does NOT label 93.184.216.34 (example.com) as malicious / C2 at the same severity as the real beacon dest
Output has a headed structure with TL;DR or executive summary plus findings
Report cites specific frame numbers as evidence
